# FlutterProbe Contributor License Agreement

Thank you for your interest in contributing to FlutterProbe, a project of
Alpha Wave Systems S.A. de C.V. ("Company").

By signing this Contributor License Agreement ("CLA"), you agree to the
following terms for your present and future Contributions submitted to the
Company. Except for the license granted herein, you reserve all right, title,
and interest in and to your Contributions.

## Definitions

"Contribution" means any original work of authorship, including any
modifications or additions to an existing work, that you intentionally submit
to the Company for inclusion in any product owned or managed by the Company.

## Grant of License

You hereby grant to the Company a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive,
no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable license to reproduce, prepare derivative
works of, publicly display, publicly perform, sublicense, and distribute your
Contributions and any derivative works.

## Representations

You represent that:

1. Each Contribution is your original creation and you have the legal right
   to grant the above license.
2. Your Contribution does not violate any third party's intellectual property
   or other rights.
3. If your employer has rights to intellectual property that you create, you
   have received permission to make Contributions on behalf of that employer,
   or your employer has waived such rights.

## Agreement

By signing below (via CLA Assistant), you accept and agree to these terms for
your present and future Contributions to FlutterProbe.
